opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain in my foot is absolute torture when I lie in bed. I have to sleep in the chair with my leg hanging down just to survive the night.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Unbearable night foot pain and a wound that's turned black — I haven't slept for days.

symptom_narrative.onset: small sore on the outer ankle ~6 weeks ago; pain became severe over the last 5 days
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right foot/ankle; the wound is on the outer ankle bone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst at night and when I lift the leg up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: hanging the leg down off the bed/chair
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat or raising the leg
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: foot feels very cold; wound base has gone black and dry; no fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the sore has been slowly getting bigger
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: barely mobile, housebound, exhausted, sleeping in a chair

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a non-healing sore on the ankle for weeks

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; exhausted and unsteady; trip hazards at home

access_barriers.other: lives alone, high falls risk from exhaustion

objective_data_offered.value: the lower leg looks pale, shiny and hairless; the foot is very cold; the ankle wound has a dry black base
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate pulses or check capillary refill

objective_data_offered.value: pain is worst lying flat and eased only by hanging the leg down
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: classic rest-pain/dependency history but not a vascular examination
